Latest Press Releases

Official announcements from TradeMatch UK Ltd.

New
05 MARCH 2026 Ă‚Â· PRODUCT
TradeMatch Launches Stripe Escrow Protection on All Jobs Ă˘â‚¬â€ť the UK's First Milestone-Gated Payment System for Trades
TradeMatch today announced full escrow integration on all platform jobs, enabling homeowners to protect payments milestone-by-milestone. Funds are FCA-regulated and held by Stripe until work is signed off Ă˘â‚¬â€ť a first in the UK trades market.

18 FEBRUARY 2026 Ă‚Â· COMPANY
TradeMatch Raises Seed Funding to Fix the UK's Ă‚Ĺ4.2B Broken Trades Marketplace
The company today revealed its seed round, aimed at scaling a platform that directly addresses the ghost lead fraud, manipulated reviews, and payment disputes that cost UK homeowners and tradespeople hundreds of millions annually.
Funding Ă‚Â· Company Read release Ă˘â€ â€™
New
02 FEBRUARY 2026 Ă‚Â· TRUST & SAFETY
TradeMatch's 4-Level Verification System Now Checks Insurance Live via API Ă˘â‚¬â€ť No More Lapsed Cover Surprises
TradeMatch's verification engine now automatically monitors public liability insurance expiry via live API connections to underwriters. Tradespeople with lapsed PLI are paused immediately Ă˘â‚¬â€ť protecting homeowners from uninsured work.
Safety Ă‚Â· Verification Read release Ă˘â€ â€™
15 JANUARY 2026 Ă‚Â· PRODUCT
Home Passport Launches: Every Certified Job Creates a Permanent Digital Record Tied to Your Property
The Home Passport auto-populates with GPS-verified photos, completion certificates, and milestone records as jobs are approved through escrow Ă˘â‚¬â€ť creating an immutable digital twin of every improvement made to a property.

TradeMatch Founding Team
CEO Ă‚Â· COO Ă‚Â· CTO Ă‚Â· London, UK
Est. 2024
Founder Statement
"We didn't build another trades directory. We built the infrastructure trust requires."

Every incumbent platform in this space made the same mistake Ă˘â‚¬â€ť they optimised for platform revenue at the expense of both sides. Tradespeople were charged for leads that went nowhere. Homeowners were left with no recourse when jobs went wrong. Reviews were suppressed. Credentials were self-declared.

TradeMatch is built on a different premise: that if you build a platform where good tradespeople are provably better off and homeowners are genuinely protected, the market comes to you. Our escrow system, live verification API, zero-suppression reviews, and 48-hour dispute SLA aren't features. They're a philosophy.

Company Timeline

Building the future
of UK trades

Q3 2024 Ă‚Â· FOUNDING
TradeMatch Ltd Founded Launch
Company registered in England & Wales. Founding team assembled. Market research completed identifying structural failures in Checkatrade, Bark, MyBuilder, and RatedPeople.
Q4 2024 Ă‚Â· PRODUCT
Core Platform Architecture Built Build
Node.js/Express API backend deployed on Vercel. Homeowner and vendor dashboards designed. 48-trade category taxonomy defined. Programmatic SEO infrastructure laid.
Q1 2025 Ă‚Â· PRODUCT
Stripe Escrow Integration Live Milestone
FCA-compliant milestone escrow goes live. Homeowners can protect payments job-by-job for the first time on a UK trades platform. Final 20% holdback tied to completion certificates.
Q2 2025 Ă‚Â· TRUST
Live Credential Verification API Safety
Real-time API connections to NICEIC, Gas Safe Register, NAPIT, and Companies House go live. Insurance expiry monitoring auto-pauses lapsed tradespeople. No more self-declared credentials.
Q3 2025 Ă‚Â· GROWTH
129 Live Pages Ă‚Â· 48 Trade Categories SEO
Full SEO moat established. 165,000+ addressable pages across 48 trade categories and UK postcodes. AEO strategy targets AI search responses from ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity.
Q4 2025 Ă‚Â· PRODUCT
Home Passport + Dispute Resolution Engine Launch
Home Passport creates permanent GPS-verified property records. 48-hour dispute SLA with human Resolver assigned to every case. 94% resolution rate without courts or legal action.
Q1 2026 Ă‚Â· FUNDING
Seed Round Closed Ă‚Â· Series A Open Funding
Seed capital secured. Ă‚Ĺ800K 2026 revenue target. Series A fundraising open targeting institutional investors. Runway to 2028 confirmed at base case projections.
2027Ă˘â‚¬â€ś2028 Ă‚Â· SCALE
National Rollout + Scotland Expansion Scale
Scotland launch from Year 2. 22,000 active paying vendors. Ă‚Ĺ9.9M revenue target. Landlord portal, property management integrations, and B2B API partnerships planned.
